_notes: Organisation of Islamic Cooperation membership: 57 states across four continents, representing roughly 1.9 billion people. Includes Palestine (treated as a sovereign state under the atlas's border policy) and a small number of states with sizeable Muslim minorities (Guyana, Suriname) rather than majorities.
name: Organisation of Islamic Cooperation
mission: International organization of 57 Muslim-majority and Muslim-population states. Coordinates political, economic, social, and cultural cooperation among members and represents collective Muslim interests internationally.
